description: XNK Webapp - Tra cứu HS Code & Chatbot AI cho Xuất Nhập Khẩu VN-TQ

tasks.title: Project Scaffold
tasks.description: Tạo cấu trúc project: backend/ frontend/ supabase/migrations/ docs/, FastAPI skeleton, Next.js 14, docker-compose, init.sh
tasks.notes: Không cần Supabase hay Claude API

tasks.title: Supabase Schema
tasks.description: Tạo migration cho hs_codes, hs_chapters, hs_sections, search_history, pg_trgm extension, GIN index

tasks.title: Seed Data — 50 mã HS XNK phổ biến VN-TQ
tasks.description: Seed 50 mã HS codes phổ biến trong thương mại Việt Nam - Trung Quốc

tasks.title: Backend HS Search API
tasks.description: GET /api/hs-codes/search với pg_trgm similarity + ILIKE fallback, GET /api/hs-codes/{code}

tasks.title: Chatbot AI (Ollama + RAG)
tasks.description: POST /api/chatbot/ask: nhận câu hỏi → search HS top 5 → context → Ollama qwen2.5-coder:32b trả lời → lưu search_history

tasks.title: Frontend: Tra cứu HS page
tasks.description: Next.js page /tra-cuu-hs: search bar, results list, detail modal. Public.

tasks.title: Frontend: Chatbot UI
tasks.description: Next.js page /chatbot: chat interface, login required

tasks.title: Frontend: Quy định page
tasks.description: Next.js page /quy-dinh: danh sách quy định, filter, search

tasks.title: Landing page + Navbar + Footer
tasks.description: / root page, shared Navbar, Footer components

tasks.title: Supabase Auth
tasks.description: Login/logout với Supabase Auth, middleware bảo vệ /chatbot và /dashboard

tasks.title: History & Stats API (RLS)
tasks.description: GET /api/history, GET /api/stats với Row Level Security

tasks.title: Dashboard frontend
tasks.description: Next.js page /dashboard: user history, stats charts. Login required.

tasks.title: Performance: Redis cache + rate limit + Docker
tasks.description: Redis cache cho search results, rate limiting cho chatbot, Docker Compose production config

tasks.title: Documentation
tasks.description: README.md, API docs (OpenAPI), deployment guide, env setup guide
